text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy, Big Bro! I love getting to see you bright
and early. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Heyyy, Big Sis! I love getting to see you bright
and early. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Look at me! My eyes are big and bright, and my
skin's so soft this morning!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I tried that bedtime stretching
routine that's been going viral recently! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So here's an extra cute Curren Chan, delivered directly to you! ♪

It seems Curren Chan used her break to prepare
her body for training!
